endpoints.description: Local-only contract stub. Android-only app has no backend; this endpoint exists only as a documented spec. If a local dev stub is ever introduced, it must return {"status":"ok"}.
Not implemented (offline, no accounts). Reserved path to satisfy contract-based tooling; must not be used by the app.
Not implemented (offline, no accounts). Reserved path to satisfy contract-based tooling; must not be used by the app.

data_models.name: CalcError
data_models.description: Consistent error shape for the engine and any future API errors. In-app errors are user-visible and non-crashing.

fields.name: code
fields.description: One of: EMPTY_EXPRESSION, INVALID_SYNTAX, UNKNOWN_TOKEN, MISMATCHED_PARENTHESES, DIVIDE_BY_ZERO, DOMAIN_ERROR.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Human-readable message safe to show in UI.

fields.name: position
fields.description: Optional character index in the original expression where the error was detected.

data_models.name: EvaluationResult
data_models.description: Result returned by CalculatorEngine.evaluate(). Exactly one of value or error must be present.

fields.name: formatted
fields.description: Display-ready string representation of the result (e.g., trimming trailing zeros).

data_models.name: HistoryEntry
data_models.description: In-memory-only history row. Cleared on app close. Used for History screen and export text.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Monotonic sequence id assigned in-memory by CalcViewModel.

fields.name: resultText
fields.description: Either formatted numeric result or a user-visible error message.

fields.name: isError
fields.description: True if resultText represents an error.

fields.name: timestampMs
fields.description: System time in milliseconds when the entry was created.

data_models.name: CalcState
data_models.description: Single source of truth for Compose UI state in CalcViewModel.

fields.name: displayValue
fields.description: What is currently shown in the calculator display (expression, result, or error message).

database.notes: No persistent storage. History is in-memory only and must be cleared when the process/app is closed. Do not add Room/SQLite/Datastore without updating this contract.

invariants: All clients use the same endpoint paths and JSON fields as defined here.
No renaming of routes, fields, or tables without updating contract.
Backend must return JSON errors in a consistent shape.
This app is Android-only and fully offline; no network calls are permitted at runtime.
No authentication or accounts: /auth/* endpoints are reserved/unused and must not be called by the app.
History is in-memory only; it must not be persisted to disk and must be cleared on app close/process death.
Expression evaluation must be implemented via tokenizer + shunting-yard (or AST) + evaluator; using eval, JavaScript engines, or reflective execution is forbidden.
Supported syntax must include: +, -, *, /, parentheses, unary minus, decimals, percent (postfix), exponentiation (^, right-associative), sqrt (√ and/or 'sqrt'), and functions sin/cos/tan/log.
All evaluation errors (divide-by-zero, invalid syntax, unknown token, mismatched parentheses, domain errors) must be surfaced as CalcError and shown to the user without crashing.
Hardware keyboard mapping must be supported: digits/operators append, Enter triggers equals, Backspace deletes, Escape or 'C' clears, parentheses keys append parentheses.
CI must run on push/PR and must execute: ktlintCheck, unit tests, and an assemble/build task; failing any step fails the pipeline.
Unit tests (JUnit) must cover tokenizer, shunting-yard/AST conversion, evaluator correctness, and core ViewModel/reducer input handling.
